description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a light wood grain finish, featuring clean, straight lines and a minimalist design. On one side, it has a set of three drawers with a contrasting gray front, likely made of metal or painted wood, providing functional storage. The table is supported by four sturdy legs, with the drawer unit integrated into the right side when viewed from the front. The tabletop is broad and flat, suitable for writing, working, or placing objects. The overall appearance is sleek and utilitarian, with no visible decorative embellishments. Its design is well-suited for urban environments such as offices, study rooms, or public workspaces.
description: A modern, light wood rectangular table with three gray drawers on one side and a clean, minimalist design. The table is sturdy and functional, ideal for work or study.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the short end, showing the plain wood grain surface and two legs, with no drawers visible.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the three gray drawers on the right side beneath the tabletop, with all four legs visible.
description_view_2: The opposite short end shows a solid wood panel between the legs, with no drawers or openings visible.
description_view_3: The back view displays the three drawers on the left side, with the rest of the table's surface and legs visible.
